CHAPTER TWO: SETTING THE TARGET

1
Meera wanted a master's to teach and grow.
I love my subject deeply.
2

3
Then she found a recognised MA she could do online.

4

From graduate to master!

Why An Online MA Just Works

  • 1
    Choose your subject: English, Economics, Public Policy and more, fully online.
  • 2
    Ideal for teaching, civil services prep, further study or a research path.
  • 3
    Wonderfully affordable: ₹45,000 for the full 2-year MA (₹22,500/year), with 0% interest EMI available.
  • 4
    A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ MA, recognised for jobs and higher study.
